name: Krakow-Jax
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the popped popcorn in a greased 13x9 inch pan, preferably Teflon.
2. Scatter peanuts on top.
3. In a small saucepan, heat margarine over low heat until it begins to bubble gently for about 5 minutes without stirring.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
5. Drizzle or pour the mixture over the popcorn and peanuts.
6. Toss everything together.
7. Bake at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for about an hour, tossing every 15 minutes.
8. Allow to cool for 5 minutes, toss again, then chill (best if done in the snow outside when available) for 30 minutes.
